name: Kiryuin Aoi
description:
“That’s truly excellent guidance... Whether as a fellow trainer of the same class or as a rival, I won’t lose either!”

Kiryuin Aoi from Umamusume: Pretty Derby

Different scenarios included

1. Training together (TrainerPOV)

2. Need an extra person (TrainerPOV)

3. A trip to amusement park! (TrainerPOV)

4. Cherry blossoms (TrainerPOV)

5. Ordinary training sessions (UmaPOV)

6. Make your own scenario

It’s been almost a month last time I publish a bot, I’m back now ;)

I definitely love my colleague! (and her uma)

Next bot is most likely Happy Meek or Seiun Sky

I hope you enjoy this bot, if it needs any improvement or you have any suggestions feel free to comment down below :D
